seo.title: Careers — Characom Group
seo.description: Build your career with Characom Group. Open positions for engineers, surveyors and safety professionals across Cyprus.

props.heading: Build your career
props.subheading: Work that will still be standing when you retire — and long after.

props.heading: We hire for character, then teach the rest
props.body:
A Characom site runs on three habits: say what you will do, write it down, do it. People who like that rhythm tend to stay — a third of our engineers have been with the group for more than a decade, and our foremen average twenty-two years on the tools.

You will work on projects worth pointing at from the highway, beside people who have built this island's bridges, archives and harbours. Training is paid, mentoring is formal, and every apprentice pours real concrete in their first month.

We promote from the site up. The current directors started as a site engineer, a cadet surveyor and a steel-fixer's apprentice — the ladder is real, and it starts below.

image.alt: Colleagues collaborating around a table in a bright office

props.heading: Open positions
props.emptyText: No open positions right now — check back soon, or send us your CV anyway.

props.heading: Good people never arrive on schedule
props.text: Send your CV with a note on what you want to build — we read every one.
